programme.desc: Feng Shanhua overcomes various hardships even after being wrongly accused. This is a story of fate, love, secrets and forgiveness that stem from her relationship with her two families, one of her birth mother and the other of the mother who raised her.

programme.title: Love Destiny S2 - EP 19
programme.desc: Li'en feels jealous seeing Yin and Pudan getting along well, but he is relieved to learn that Yin does not visit Pudan as often as him. Meanwhile, Pei Jing suspects that Jialajie might be teasing her by introducing dishes she knows Li'en does not enjoy.

programme.title: The Real Has Come! - EP 3
programme.desc: At her birthday party, Madam Yin publicly announces Taijing's engagement to Shizhen. Furious, Taijing drags Shizhen away and firmly declares that he will never marry her.

programme.title: The Real Has Come! - EP 4
programme.desc: Taijing conducts a prenatal checkup for Liandou and discovers one fetus has vanished. Heartbroken, Liandou learns she now carries only one child. Soon after, news of Liandou's unmarried pregnancy is leaked by a jealous star lecturer, putting her career at risk.

programme.title: Freedom Travelers - EP 5
programme.desc: In this travelogue, Youtuber Ben Wu, affectionately known as "Rong Rong", will lead the audience to a brand new adventure in Turkey through his unique storytelling.

programme.title: Feud - EP 7
programme.desc: As identity doubts deepen, Qingyue starts questioning her role and past.

programme.title: News Tonight
programme.desc: Daily evening updates on top local news and world news.

programme.title: End of Transmission
programme.desc: End of Transmission

programme.title: Aspromonte: Land Of The Forgotten
programme.desc: In 1959 in Africo, Aspromonte, a woman dies in childbirth because the lack of roads prevented the doctor from reaching in time. The tragedy unites the villagers and Giulia, a new teacher, to build a road. But Giulia must contend with local mafia Don Totó.

programme.title: Cortina Express
programme.desc: During the Christmas holidays in Cortina, a colorful cast of characters cross paths among the snow-capped Ampezzo mountains. Between love, redemption, and second-chances, their lives collide in a series of hilarious and heartfelt quests for a happy ending

programme.title: Cracks In Concrete
programme.desc: Ertan leaves jail after 10 years and tries to settle back in society. Mikail spends his time with parties, drugs and dreaming of a life as a gangster rapper. Ertan looks for Mikail. Mikail doesn't know Ertan. Soon they must face a harsh reality.

programme.title: The Rising Tide
programme.desc: When her father fails to return home, the sound of his boat’s engine is the only thing a daughter has to remember of him. Learning from an elderly mechanic, she wishes to repair her father’s boat in hope of his return.

programme.title: In His Hands
programme.desc: Clara, a lawyer, leads a serene but monotonous life alongside her husband Damien and their two children. One evening, she succumbs to the charm of a mysterious sculptor. This one scorching night will have dramatic repercussions for her and her family.

programme.title: Wajma, An Afghan Love Story
programme.desc: In conservative Kabul, young Wajma discovers she is pregnant out of wedlock. Her boyfriend denies paternity and her father locks her up for being a disgrace. Driven by desperation, Wajma takes extreme measures forcing everyone to re-think their actions.

programme.title: The Takeover
programme.desc: Cédric works in a company specialized in precision mechanics. Its management, run by an investment fund, is disastrous. As another fund is about to buy it again, Cédric decides to take the company over, giving it to the employees.

programme.title: Paris La Blanche
programme.desc: In this parable of migration, Rekia, 70 years-old, leaves Kabylie for Paris to fetch her husband, Nour, back home. Nour has been sustaining the family from abroad for 40 years. Finding help in new friends, she finds Nour but he is a changed man.

programme.title: NR24
programme.desc: The most ordinary man became the perfect spy. 22-year-old Gunnar Sønsteby decides to resist Nazi-Germany on the day of the invasion to later lead the "Oslo-gang" in executing countless daring acts of sabotage making him Norway's greatest war hero.

programme.title: Romancing The Jungle
programme.desc: Eva is a rookie journalist keen on investigating sea piracy. When she is really kidnapped by pirates in Thailand, she is forced to fight for her life. With her is a hunky smuggler called Nik, and together, the comedic duo band together to survive.

programme.title: Kebaya
programme.desc: Ting, a young air stewardess, navigates her new role as a caregiver for her grandmother while building a relationship with her distant father.

programme.title: Bille
programme.desc: In late 1930s Latvia, young Bille grows up in poverty, caught between her mother’s contempt and her father’s alcoholism. Escaping into books and her imagination, she dreams of a better world as she embarks on her path to becoming a celebrated writer.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Omron Knee TENS
programme.desc: The OMRON Knee TENS is a drug-free, non-invasive device designed to relieve knee pain and stiffness using clinically proven TENS technology. Compact and easy to use, it delivers gentle electrical pulses that stimulate nerves and improve blood circulation, helping to reduce pain from arthritis, injury, or overuse. With customizable intensity levels and ideal for daily use at home or on the go. OMRON 膝盖电疗仪是一款非药物、非侵入式的膝部护理设备，采用微电流技术TENS，有效缓解膝盖疼痛与僵硬感。产品轻巧易用，通过温和电脉冲刺激神经、促进血液循环，帮助缓解因关节炎、运动伤害或过度使用引起的不适。多段强度可调，贴合膝盖设计，提供精准、舒适的护理体验。

Lightweight yet powerful, it makes cleaning quick and comfortable with its ergonomic design and long-lasting battery. programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - ErgoLuxe Ergonomic Chair v2
programme.desc: What starts as another chaotic workday turns into a full-blown chair investigation! programme.title: Warna Ramadan - EP 2
programme.desc: Get ready for a hilarious and informative episode! Let's get tips on survive fasting while working, avoid heat stroke from nutrionist - Raihan Yacob and debunk Ramadan myths with the siblings duo in Cuit-Cuit. Plus, discover how to stay cool and be modestly fashionable in Gaya.

programme.title: Indonesia Authentic Places - EP 12
programme.desc: For most of the time, Indonesia is a magnet for most travelers and adventurers. With more than seventeen thousand islands scattered across over five million kilometers and three time zones that needs a lifetime to explore and appreciate its natural beauty. Same with its title, the program sums it all up into twenty-five must-visit authentic destinations that simply cannot be missed. From defining beaches to magical mountains and wild forests, be prepared to be amazed by authentic Indonesia.

programme.title: Couple Cosmo - EP 2
programme.desc: Ruby sees the opportunity to earn quick cash at Sofea's residence and dares to take the risk. While Firman thinks Tipez's presence will solve his household problems, it creates more tension for Happy. Secretly, Tipez has something up her sleeves. Everyone seems to have a skeleton in their closet. What could it be?

programme.title: Melur Untuk Firdaus 2 - EP 24
programme.desc: Raykal infuriates Firdaus when he demands Firdaus to apologise to Mawar for Melur's action. Zain meets Melur to seek her assistance.

programme.title: S.P.Y. S2 - EP 10
programme.desc: Natasha, Yusuf, Alyssa and Hasif investigate two deaths involving a middle-aged businessman and a young undergraduate. The team then discovers that a group named Anak Merah are involved. Relationship between Hasif & his brother Nizam is on the mend when the team discovers that Nizam is linked to Anak Merah's operations.

programme.title: Aku Seorang Perempuan - EP 12
programme.desc: Siti Noraisya struggles as she faces challenges embarking on her own business. She rejects Ehsan's help, but all is not lost as there is a silver lining in every dark clouds.

programme.title: Rahasia Dan Cinta - EP 2
programme.desc: Dwita, the daughter of a prominent entrepreneur finds herself caught in an arranged marriage with Greg - a match orchestrated by their fathers to merge their companies. Aware that Dwita would likely resist this plan, her father assigns her a personal bodyguard, Debu, to keep her in line. As Dwita, Greg and Deby embark on this unexpected journey together, a series of challenges and complications arise, turning Dwita's life upside down.

programme.title: Andai Tiada Suri - EP 1
programme.desc: Hisyam Hamid and Zahiril Adzim from the hit drama Andai Tiada Dia swap scripts for spatulas as they step into the kitchen together. Catch the laughter as they fumble and have fun cooking classic Ramadan favourites all under the watchful and witty guidance of Malaysia's iconic TV Moms.

programme.title: Apa Nak Masak Ni? - EP 1
